revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-7-090 

A device that automatically keeps a voltage within specified limits.


Note: The term automatic voltage regulator (AVR) is used for a device that automatically keeps the output voltage of a generator within specified limits.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Voltage stabiliser}}
